content: MDX code-demo tooling comparison: Sandpack (~400KB+ gzip, full live editing + npm imports + in-browser Node runtime via Nodebox, used by react.dev) is heaviest but most capable; react-live (~83KB gzip, live editing, no npm imports) is the lightweight live-editing option used by Formidable Labs; Code Hike (no live editing, used by Next.js docs) is best for annotated/static code walkthroughs with step-by-step highlighting. Recommendation pattern: Sandpack for heavy interactive articles, Code Hike for explanatory code walkthroughs, custom React components for bespoke individual demos.
